constraints: Use only structured local evidence in this deterministic scenario
expected_thesis: A general agent production kernel must separate domain packs from the core control plane.
question: What proves that an agent production kernel is general rather than software-only?

sources.claim: Domain packs should provide manifests, schemas, tools, roles, and adapters on top of the core.
sources.title: Architecture domain pack contract

sources.claim: A registry can make pack discovery explicit instead of hardcoding one software pack.
sources.title: Pack registry

sources.claim: A non-software replay scenario is a minimal generality proof.
sources.title: Research replay

success_criteria: The answer distinguishes core runtime from domain pack wiring
The evidence includes a non-software pack
